## Goal

This fixture exercises the harness-link exemption. The forbidden prefix
appears only inside a markdown link to the harness GitHub repo and must
NOT trigger a violation.

See [composed.mjs](https://github.com/henrik-me/agent-harness/blob/main/lib/composed.mjs)
for the harness implementation detail referenced by this plan.
